title: PraeparoVisualUmbrellaConfig
description: Conditional YAML schema for Praeparo visual definitions. Branches are selected by the top-level 'type' field.

MatrixConfig.description: Top-level configuration for a matrix visual.

title.description: Matrix title used in decks or charts.
title.title: Title

dataSource.description: Named data source reference or relative path to a data source definition.
dataSource.title: Datasource

define.description: Optional DAX DEFINE statements prefixed to generated queries.
define.title: Define

calculate.description: Optional DAX predicate injected into CALCULATETABLE before other filters.
calculate.title: Calculate

rows.description: Row templates expressed using Jinja-style placeholders.
rows.title: Rows

values.description: Collection of value columns that populate the matrix body.
values.title: Values

totals.description: Controls whether grand totals are displayed for rows, columns, or both.

filters.description: Global filters applied to every generated query before evaluation.
filters.title: Filters

autoHeight.description: Automatically size the rendered matrix height based on row count.
autoHeight.title: Autoheight

compose.title: Compose
compose.description: List of additional YAML files to merge before validation.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.description: Template values injected into the configuration before validation.

CartesianChartConfig.description: Top-level configuration for registered column/bar visuals.

dataSource.description: Optional datasource reference used for live execution.
dataSource.title: Datasource

define.description: DEFINE blocks prepended to generated DAX statements.

calculate.description: CALCULATE filters applied globally to every measure in the visual. Accepts strings, sequences, or named mappings (mapping keys are labels).
calculate.title: Calculate

mock.description: Mock data scenarios used for previews.

schema.description: Optional schema version identifier for the visual document.
schema.title: Schema

compose.description: List of additional YAML files to merge before validation.

sort.description: Advanced sorting instructions applied to resolved categories.

format.description: Formatting directive applied to label text.

position.description: Where the legend is rendered relative to the plot.

show.description: When true, render markers on the line trace.
show.title: Show

key.description: Grouping key used to stack related series together.

mode.description: Stacking behaviour applied to the series.

mode.description: Transformation applied to the resolved series values.

render.description: Render-time options for the exported asset.

name.description: Display name for the governance matrix visual.
name.title: Name

datasource.description: Optional Praeparo datasource reference used for live data.
datasource.title: Datasource

calculate.description: Scoped predicates applied to every metric in this visual.

style.description: Optional styling defaults applied to all sections and metrics in this visual.

theme.description: Optional theme overrides for this visual.

layout_mode.description: Optional snapshot/PPTX column sizing mode. When omitted, governance matrices use the default full-width layout unless a CLI or pack metadata override supplies one.
layout_mode.title: Layout Mode

header_metric_label.description: Override the header label for the metric column (defaults to 'Metric').
header_metric_label.title: Header Metric Label

header_label_style.description: Optional style applied to the metric header cell.

header_value_style.description: Optional style applied to the value/date header cells.

sla_defaults.description: Optional SLA defaults applied when rows omit overrides.

show_metrics_header.description: When metrics are provided at the visual root, controls whether their synthetic section header is rendered.
show_metrics_header.title: Show Metrics Header

columns.description: Dataset column references used for matrix visuals (ordered).
columns.title: Columns

content_order.description: Explicit display order when both sections and metrics are defined.

governance_matrix_visual__GovernanceMatr.description:
Named calculate predicates with governance-matrix override semantics.

    Governance matrix visuals have three calculate layers (visual → section → metric).
    For governance matrices we want two behaviours:

    - **Named entries** (`calculate.<name>: ...`) are overrideable, with last-writer-wins
      semantics per name (mirrors Praeparo pack behaviour).
    - **Unlabelled entries** (`calculate: <string|list>` or `calculate: {define:..., evaluate:...}`)
      remain additive, preserving layer order.

    We preserve authored names by normalising the raw YAML into a `ScopedCalculateMap`.
governance_matrix_visual__GovernanceMatr.title: GovernanceMatrixCalculate

type.description: Semantic type for payload coercion (date, string, number).
type.title: Type

order.description: Optional column ordering hint (asc or desc).
order.title: Order

mock_values.description: Optional display labels for mock datasets (order preserved).
mock_values.title: Mock Values

governance_matrix_visual__GovernanceMatr.description: Reference to a metric row used in a governance matrix visual.
